summary: Implement minimal SQLite-backed API loop and e2e smoke flow (capture -> event -> queue).
rollbackPlan: git restore socialos/apps/api/README.md socialos/apps/api/server.mjs scripts/tests/e2e_smoke.mjs scripts/test.sh
digestBullets: Add tiny local API endpoints for capture/event/queue on top of existing SQLite schema.
Add e2e smoke script that exercises capture->event->queue and verifies DB writes.
Wire e2e smoke into scripts/test.sh to make P0-3 verifiable in one command.
Keep changes local-first and avoid any gateway/network exposure changes.
